name: Sklearn Random Forest Classifier
description: Random Forest Classifier is an ensemble-based supervised learning algorithm that builds multiple decision trees on different bootstrapped subsets of the training data and aggregates their predictions using majority voting. By combining randomness in data sampling and feature selection, it improves classification accuracy, reduces variance, and minimizes the risk of overfitting compared to a single decision tree.

fields.name: targetCol
fields.title: Target Column
fields.description: Target label column containing the ground-truth class values used for model training.

fields.name: featureCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: List of input feature columns used to train the classifier. All features must be numeric, boolean, or vector-compatible.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Ratio used to split the dataset into training and testing subsets.

fields.name: n_estimators
fields.title: NEstimators
fields.description: Number of decision trees to build in the random forest ensemble.

fields.name: criterion
fields.title: Criterion
fields.description: Metric used to evaluate the quality of a split. Gini measures node impurity, while entropy measures information gain.

fields.name: max_depth
fields.title: MaxDepth
fields.description: Maximum depth of each decision tree. If not set, trees expand until leaves are pure or contain fewer samples than min_samples_split.

fields.name: min_samples_split
fields.title: MinSamplesSplit
fields.description: Minimum number of samples required to split an internal node. Larger values make the model more conservative.

fields.name: min_samples_leaf
fields.title: MinSamplesLeaf
fields.description: Minimum number of samples required at a leaf node, ensuring each leaf represents sufficient data.

fields.name: min_weight_fraction_leaf
fields.title: MinWeightFractionLeaf
fields.description: Minimum weighted fraction of total sample weight required at a leaf node.

fields.name: max_features
fields.title: MaxFeatures
fields.description: Number of features considered when looking for the best split at each node.

fields.name: max_leaf_nodes
fields.title: MaxLeafNodes
fields.description: Maximum number of leaf nodes per tree. Limits tree growth to control complexity.

fields.name: min_impurity_decrease
fields.title: MinImpurityDecrease
fields.description: Minimum impurity reduction required for a node split. Higher values reduce overfitting.

fields.name: bootstrap
fields.title: Bootstrap
fields.description: Whether bootstrap sampling is used when building trees. If False, the entire dataset is used for each tree.

fields.name: oob_score
fields.title: OobScore
fields.description: Whether to use out-of-bag samples to estimate generalization performance.

fields.name: random_state
fields.title: RandomState
fields.description: Seed controlling randomness in bootstrap sampling and feature selection.

fields.name: warm_start
fields.title: WarmStart
fields.description: When enabled, previously trained trees are reused and additional trees are added to the model.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Whether to display the confusion matrix visualization.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed above the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Description displayed alongside the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing actual class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix PredictedLabel Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing predicted class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing instance counts.

fields.name: path
fields.title: Save Confusion Matrix Path
fields.description: Filesystem path used to save the confusion matrix output.

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome description
fields.description: Business interpretation of confusion matrix outcomes.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Whether to display the ROC curve visualization.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed above the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Description displayed alongside the ROC curve.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: Label for the X-axis of the ROC curve.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Label for the Y-axis of the ROC curve.
